/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/convex_hull_3d.dir/app/main.cpp.o -o convex_hull_3d  libconvex_hull_3d_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /home/caiof/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libglm.a /home/caiof/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libgmpxx.a /home/caiof/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libmpfr.a /home/caiof/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libgmp.a
